name: Orange Peach Marmalade
recipeInstructions:
1 Wash, peel and pit the peaches.
2 Wash the oranges and remove the peel, saving the peel from 1 1/2 oranges.
3 Coarsely grind the peaches, oranges and peel.
4 Measure the ground mixture and add an equal amount of sugar.
5 Mix the fruit, lemon juice and Fruit Fresh.
6 Cook for 25 minutes in a heavy pot, stirring often to prevent sticking.
7 Seal in hot sterilized jars.
